bridgePrinciples: All durable writes go through the central API.
Native bridge exposes explicit permission-gated commands only.
Desktop can hand off central API-issued runner pairing proof after user confirmation.
Desktop cannot mutate task leases, TaskResult, AgentRun, or private runner state.
Local diagnostics must redact tokens, credentials, raw source body text, and file contents.

commands.name: selectSourceFileReference
commands.purpose: Use OS picker to register a file reference and metadata.
writes: SourceMaterial reference through central API only

commands.name: requestNotificationPermission
commands.purpose: Ask OS notification permission only after first user-visible need.
writes: permission audit event through central API when available

commands.name: showNotification
commands.purpose: Display user-facing notification for a central NotificationRecord.

commands.name: resolveDeepLink
commands.purpose: Resolve object links and runner pairing callbacks.

commands.name: readLocalSetting
commands.purpose: Read non-secret display settings and channel metadata.

commands.name: writeLocalSetting
commands.purpose: Write non-secret display settings and channel metadata.

commands.name: storeCredentialReference
commands.purpose: Store OS secure-storage reference or encrypted access handle, never raw secret values.

commands.name: getRunnerPairingDiagnostics
commands.purpose: Detect local runner presence and heartbeat diagnostics.

commands.name: handoffRunnerPairingProof
commands.purpose: Pass a central API-issued scoped pairing proof to a local runner after user confirmation.

commands.name: collectRedactedDiagnostics
commands.purpose: Collect release, bridge, network, and permission diagnostics with redaction.

fallbackDecisionTrigger: If Tauri fails any launch-blocking Slice 0 proof and no in-slice fix is viable, produce an Electron fallback decision request before broad desktop UI implementation.
